content_md:
Exercise normal precaution

in **Brunei**.

Brunei is generally a safe destination for travelers.

  * Basic emergency medical care is available throughout Brunei. However, response times may be limited in rural areas. Review the [Health section](https://travel.state.gov/en/international-travel/travel-advisories/destination.brn.html#health "Health Section") of the Travel Guidance on this page for more information.
  * Review our [travel guidance](/en/international-travel/travel-advisories/brunei.html#requirements "Brunei Travel Guidance") for Brunei to learn how to prepare for a safe trip.
